summary: Complete guide with updated study tips and practice questions.
reason: Directly targets Salesforce Admin certification preparation.
suggested_comment: Great study resource for anyone prepping for the Admin cert! Covers all the updated exam objectives. Highly recommend bookmarking this one.

title: Build a LWC Component from Scratch — Full Tutorial

reason: Practical LWC development tutorial directly relevant to developer playground.
suggested_comment: If you're learning LWC, this is a solid walkthrough. Covers component lifecycle, data binding, and wire adapters with a real use case.

title: Salesforce Spring '25 Release Highlights
summary: Key new features in the Spring 25 release including Flow enhancements and Einstein updates.
reason: Official release notes — extremely relevant for all Salesforce practitioners.
suggested_comment: Spring '25 is here! Key things to check: Flow updates, Einstein for Service, and the new Slack integration improvements. Good reading for the whole team.

title: How to bulk update records without hitting governor limits?
summary: Best practices for bulk DML operations in Apex to stay within Salesforce governor limits.
reason: Common Apex development issue relevant to engineering team troubleshooting.
suggested_comment: Good reference for anyone hitting governor limit issues with bulk operations. The accepted answer covers chunking patterns and Database.SaveResult handling.
